location: Looted from a corpse at the end of the northwest-facing parapet on Castle Morne's upper battlements (Weeping Peninsula), guarded by two Misbegotten. From the execution podium area, climb the ladder behind the Pumpkin Head enemy to reach the parapet — do not take the southwest parapet route with the flying Misbegotten, which leads to a different item.

source.name: Corpse on the northwest parapet, Castle Morne

tactics: From Castle Morne Lift grace, work your way up through the castle's courtyard and ramparts toward the execution podium area
Near the podium, a separate corpse on the ground drops a Furlcalling Finger Remedy — don't mistake that for the torch, which is further up on the parapet
Climb the ladder behind the Pumpkin Head enemy to reach the northwest-facing parapet where the torch's corpse sits, guarded by two Misbegotten
The southwest parapet (with winged/flying Misbegotten) is a different path leading to a different item — easy to take the wrong ladder
lore: A standard torch reinforced by wrapping the head in metal wire; heavier to swing, but the heated wire filament burns hotter and pushes noticeably more fire damage into every hit.

builds.name: Dexterity/Strength quality off-hand
builds.why: Dexterity is its strongest scaling stat alongside Strength, giving it the highest raw fire attack power among the basic torches — appealing to quality builds wanting extra fire damage.

builds.name: Firebreather utility
builds.why: Its innate Firebreather skill projects fire in a cone rather than a simple poke, and since the weapon can't be infused with a different Ash of War, this skill is its main combat identity.
